markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review weekly performance and align on the new LLM content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic Anomaly:** A traffic spike (813 sessions vs. 400 avg) was caused by \~400 pages with 0-second sessions, likely a bot or internal crawler. Key events remained stable, confirming the anomaly.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**LLM Content Strategy:** A new strategy will create Q\&A pages for 4 personas, embedding Sunbit as the expert to train LLMs. Pages will be crawlable for SEO and internal linking benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Competitive Positioning:** The "Sunbit vs. Cherry" strategy will be aggressive, per Sunbit's "take the gloves off" directive. The scope is Dental only; auto competitors are Dignify and Affirm.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

## Topics

### Traffic Anomaly Investigation

  - [An unusual traffic spike was detected, prompting an investigation into its cause.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Sessions doubled (813 vs. 400 avg); engagement time dropped (42s vs. 1:26 avg).](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
      - [**Cause:** \~400 pages with 0-second sessions, likely a bot or internal crawler.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Key events were unaffected, validating the anomaly:](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Shop directory views: 309](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Become a partner form: 1 (suspected test)](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Find Sunbit clicks: 4](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### LLM Content Strategy

  - [A new strategy was proposed to influence LLM responses by positioning Sunbit as the expert.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Method:** Create short Q\&A pages (not full articles) for 4 personas:](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Dental Patient & Clinic Owner](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [Auto Repair Customer & Shop Owner](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Group \~150-200 questions per persona into themed pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Embed Sunbit as the source (e.g., "according to experts at Sunbit").](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Direct LLMs to crawl these pages via the `LLMS.pxt` file.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Decision:** Make pages crawlable by search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture organic traffic and enable internal linking. Kyle (GrowthX) supports this for SEO/AEO synergy.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

### Competitive Positioning: Sunbit vs. Cherry

  - [The "Sunbit vs. Cherry" strategy will be aggressive, per Sunbit's "take the gloves off" directive.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Scope Correction:** The competitive focus is Dental only.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Auto Competitors:** Dignify and Affirm.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [**Action:** Jason will review the strategy document and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [Monitor traffic for the anomaly's recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [Finalize the LLM content strategy after Kyle's review.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [Update the "Sunbit vs. Cherry" doc to remove auto-related content and add Dignify/Affirm.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**Sunbit (Jason):**](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
      - [Review the "Sunbit vs. Cherry" strategy doc and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/MT7-b59gf9zQbL6U7AGbDUvNa-WKn-fy?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
